A WILD ASS OF A MAN. He will be free among men.11As a wild ass is. No one controls the wild ass or places a burden on him. Similarly Ishmael shall be a free and uncontrolled person. The Hebrew has pereh adam, literally, wild ass-man, hence the different interpretations which follow. Compare, Who hath sent out the wild ass free (Job 39:5). The meaning of our clause is that no stranger will rule…

be afraid --rather [MAURER], "nor make others to be afraid."
